title: Restorative Vietnamese Rice Bowl
description: A malty, fluffy, and plant-based-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring pink food coloring, perfect for post-workout rest and recovery. This dish is designed to be easy to digest and replenish energy stores.
instructions: Rinse the Jasmine rice in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, combine the rice and 2 cups of water, and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the water is absorbed and the rice is fluffy.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mung bean paste, coconut milk, maple syrup, and pink food coloring until smooth.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and add the toasted sesame seeds, stirring constantly for 1 minute.
Add the mung bean paste mixture to the skillet and stir to combine with the sesame seeds and oil.
To assemble the rice bowls, divide the cooked rice between two bowls and top with the mung bean paste mixture.
Season with salt to taste and serve immediately.
